figures.caption: Table 2: JFinTEB Task Statistics. Chars indicates the median number of characters in the validation (val.) set.
Table 4: Evaluation Results on JFinTEB Tasks. Avg. is the average score across all the tasks (excluding MultiFin-ja and Industry 33.) Best scores are in bold. Clust. refers to a clustering task.

Figure 1: Overview of JFinTEB benchmark. JFinTEB is a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating Japanese financial text embeddings, covering diverse tasks such as classification, retrieval, and clustering.
